text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: bdrewery
Date: Thu Oct  2 18:11:14 UTC 2014
New revision: 272434

Log:
  MFC r271720:

    If fgets(3) fails in getbounds(), show strerror(3) if not an EOF. Also fix a
    FILE* leak in getbounds().

  Approved by:	re (gjb)

_U  stable/10/
